pipeline.response: The 2025 budget was presented to parliament by Dr. Cassiel Ato Forson, who is the Minister for Finance, on the authority of His Excellency John Dramani Mahama, the President of the Republic of Ghana, on March 11, 2025 [large_pdf_page_003_001].
